race.description: Thanks To Sub Zero Air Conditioning Handicap
race.comment: LADY ZAYDI (6) returns from a spell of 11 weeks and did win first-up last time in work over 800m at this track. Looks set to run well again. RAIDERLICIOUS (7) returns from a spell of three months and is having her first run for a new yard. Finished tenth at Goulburn over 1300m when first-up last time in work. Leading hope and should be tough to stop. MR PLAYTIME (3) tasted defeat last start when fourth over 1000m at Sunshine Coast, beaten 8 lengths. Faces an easier assignment so he is likely to feature in the finish. ADDICTIVE PIRANHA (10) returns from a spell of four-and-a-half months and is having her first run for a new yard. Finished eighth at Toowoomba over 1000m when first-up last time in work. Respect any market confidence.
